title: Sith dreadnaught

The '''Sith dreadnaught''', also known as a '''Sith Personnel Carrier''' was a classification of [[Warship/Legends|warship]] used by the [[Sith Empire/Legends|Sith Empire]] during the [[Great Hyperspace War/Legends|Great Hyperspace War]]. These dreadnaughts resembled [[lanvarok]]s in appearance. They carried six [[Sith drop ship]]s that were able to deploy troops to ground invasions, holding sixty troops or two [[Sith war behemoth]]s each.

In [[5000 BBY/Legends|5000 BBY]], two Sith dreadnaughts, [[Harbinger (Sith dreadnaught)|''Harbinger'']] and ''[[Omen]]'', were [[Mining/Legends|mining]] [[Lignan]] [[Ore/Legends|ore]] on a [[Moon/Legends|moon]] of [[Phaegon III]] for use in the upcoming [[Battle of Kirrek (Great Hyperspace War)|Battle of Kirrek]], when they were [[Skirmish over Phaegon III|ambushed]] by [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Relin Druur]] and Druur's [[Padawan/Legends|apprentice]], [[Drev Hassin]]. Hassin [[Death/Legends|sacrificed]] himself by crashing the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi's]] [[Infiltrator (starfighter)|Infiltrator]] [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] into ''Harbinger''{{'s}} bridge, causing the dreadnaught to crash into ''Omen'' right as the two [[Starship/Legends|ships]] jumped into [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]]. This caused the ''Omen'' to crash-land on the remote [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[Kesh/Legends|Kesh]], where its survivors formed the [[Lost Tribe of Sith]], while the ''Harbinger'' entered an unstable hyperspace [[Hyperspace route/Legends|tunnel]] and [[Time travel/Legends|traveled]] through [[Time/Legends|time]] to [[41 ABY|41.5 ABY]]. The latter was shortly after [[Mission to the Harbinger|destroyed]] by Druur.

Sometime between [[3959 BBY]] and [[3956 BBY]], a [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]-allied [[Zabrak/Legends|Zabrak]] [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenary]] named [[Jamoh Hogra]] raided one of these [[Capital ship/Legends|capital ships]]. He completed his mission aboard the starship and escaped, but feared for his life, purchasing a heavy, unique suit of battle [[Jamoh Hogra's battle armor|armor]] to protect himself from [[Sith assassin/Legends|Sith assassins]] that might be after him.

Around 41.5 ABY, the Lost Tribe of Sith, with the help of [[Ship (Sith Meditation Sphere)|Ship]], a [[Sith Meditation Sphere]], began to form a [[Sith armada (Lost Tribe of the Sith)|Sith armada]], and managed to repair the ''Omen'' for use in their [[Fleet/Legends|fleet]].
